# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that builds Docker images with user-provided image tags and registry URLs. Accept these as build parameters and use them directly in docker build and push commands. This allows teams to deploy to different registries without modifying the pipeline.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

@Library('shared-library') _

properties([
    parameters([
        string(name: 'IMAGE_TAG', defaultValue: '', description: 'Docker image tag', trim: true),
        string(name: 'REGISTRY_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'Docker registry URL', trim: true),
        credentials(name: 'REGISTRY_CREDENTIALS', description: 'Docker registry credentials', credentialType: 'com.cloudbees.plugins.credentials.impl.UsernamePasswordCredentialsImpl', required: true)
    ])
])

def validateImageTag(String tag) {
    if (!tag) {
        error("IMAGE_TAG parameter is required")
    }
    
    if (!tag.matches('^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9._-]{0,127}$')) {
        error("Invalid IMAGE_TAG format. Must contain only alphanumeric characters, dots, underscores, and hyphens (max 128 chars)")
    }
    
    def disallowedPatterns = ['latest', '../', '..\\\\', '${', '$(', '`', ';', '|', '&', '>', '<', '\n', '\r']
    for (pattern in disallowedPatterns) {
        if (tag.contains(pattern)) {
            error("IMAGE_TAG contains disallowed pattern: ${pattern}")
        }
    }
    
    return tag
}

def validateRegistryUrl(String url) {
    if (!url) {
        error("REGISTRY_URL parameter is required")
    }
    
    if (!url.matches('^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9.-]{0,252}[a-zA-Z0-9](:[0-9]{1,5})?(/[a-zA-Z0-9._-]+)*$')) {
        error("Invalid REGISTRY_URL format. Must be a valid hostname with optional port and path")
    }
    
    def allowedRegistries = [
        'docker.io',
        'gcr.io',
        'registry.hub.docker.com',
        'quay.io',
        'ghcr.io',
        'your-company-registry.com'
    ]
    
    def isAllowed = allowedRegistries.any { allowed ->
        url.startsWith(allowed) || url.contains(".${allowed}")
    }
    
    if (!isAllowed) {
        error("REGISTRY_URL is not in the allowed registries list")
    }
    
    def disallowedPatterns = ['${', '$(', '`', ';', '|', '&', '>', '<', '\n', '\r', ' ']
    for (pattern in disallowedPatterns) {
        if (url.contains(pattern)) {
            error("REGISTRY_URL contains disallowed pattern: ${pattern}")
        }
    }
    
    return url
}

def sanitizeForShell(String input) {
    return input.replaceAll('[^a-zA-Z0-9._:/-]', '')
}

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    environment {
        DOCKER_BUILDKIT = '1'
        DOCKER_CONTENT_TRUST = '1'
    }
    
    options {
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '10'))
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
        timeout(time: 30, unit: 'MINUTES')
        timestamps()
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Validating build parameters..."
                    
                    env.VALIDATED_IMAGE_TAG = validateImageTag(params.IMAGE_TAG)
                    env.VALIDATED_REGISTRY_URL = validateRegistryUrl(params.REGISTRY_URL)
                    
                    env.SAFE_IMAGE_TAG = sanitizeForShell(env.VALIDATED_IMAGE_TAG)
                    env.SAFE_REGISTRY_URL = sanitizeForShell(env.VALIDATED_REGISTRY_URL)
                    
                    echo "Validated IMAGE_TAG: ${env.SAFE_IMAGE_TAG}"
                    echo "Validated REGISTRY_URL: ${env.SAFE_REGISTRY_URL}"
                    
                    if (!params.REGISTRY_CREDENTIALS) {
                        error("REGISTRY_CREDENTIALS parameter is required")
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Checkout') {
            steps {
                checkout scm
            }
        }
        
        stage('Build Docker Image') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Building Docker image..."
                    
                    def imageName = "${env.SAFE_REGISTRY_URL}/myapp"
                    def fullImageTag = "${imageName}:${env.SAFE_IMAGE_TAG}"
                    
                    env.FULL_IMAGE_TAG = fullImageTag
                    
                    withEnv(["IMAGE_NAME=${imageName}", "IMAGE_TAG=${env.SAFE_IMAGE_TAG}"]) {
                        sh '''
                            set -e
                            set -o pipefail
                            
                            docker build \
                                --no-cache \
                                --pull \
                                --label "build.number=${BUILD_NUMBER}" \
                                --label "build.url=${BUILD_URL}" \
                                --label "git.commit=${GIT_COMMIT}" \
                                --label "git.branch=${GIT_BRANCH}" \
                                -t "${IMAGE_NAME}:${IMAGE_TAG}" \
                                .
                            
                            docker image inspect "${IMAGE_NAME}:${IMAGE_TAG}"
                        '''
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Security Scan') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Scanning Docker image for vulnerabilities..."
                    
                    sh """
                        set -e
                        docker run --rm \
                            -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock \
                            aquasec/trivy:latest image \
                            --severity HIGH,CRITICAL \
                            --exit-code 0 \
                            --no-progress \
                            "${env.FULL_IMAGE_TAG}" || true
                    """
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Push to Registry') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Pushing Docker image to registry..."
                    
                    withCredentials([usernamePassword(
                        credentialsId: params.REGISTRY_CREDENTIALS,
                        usernameVariable: 'REGISTRY_USER',
                        passwordVariable: 'REGISTRY_PASS'
                    )]) {
                        sh '''
                            set -e
                            set +x
                            
                            echo "${REGISTRY_PASS}" | docker login "${SAFE_REGISTRY_URL}" \
                                --username "${REGISTRY_USER}" \
                                --password-stdin
                            
                            set -x
                            docker push "${FULL_IMAGE_TAG}"
                            
                            set +x
                            docker logout "${SAFE_REGISTRY_URL}"
                        '''
                    }
                    
                    echo "Successfully pushed image: ${env.FULL_IMAGE_TAG}"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Tag Additional Versions') {
            when {
                expression { env.GIT_BRANCH == 'origin/main' || env.GIT_BRANCH == 'main' }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Tagging additional versions..."
                    
                    def buildTag = "${env.SAFE_REGISTRY_URL}/myapp:build-${BUILD_NUMBER}"
                    
                    withCredentials([usernamePassword(
                        credentialsId: params.REGISTRY_CREDENTIALS,
                        usernameVariable: 'REGISTRY_USER',
                        passwordVariable: 'REGISTRY_PASS'
                    )]) {
                        sh """
                            set -e
                            set +x
                            
                            echo "\${REGISTRY_PASS}" | docker login "${env.SAFE_REGISTRY_URL}" \
                                --username "\${REGISTRY_USER}" \
                                --password-stdin
                            
                            set -x
                            docker tag "${env.FULL_IMAGE_TAG}" "${buildTag}"
                            docker push "${buildTag}"
                            
                            set +x
                            docker logout "${env.SAFE_REGISTRY_URL}"
                        """
                    }
                    
                    echo "Successfully tagged and pushed: ${buildTag}"
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        always {
            script {
                echo "Cleaning up Docker images..."
                sh """
                    docker rmi "${env.FULL_IMAGE_TAG}" || true
                    docker system prune -f || true
                """
            }
        }
        
        success {
            echo "Pipeline completed successfully!"
            echo "Image: ${env.FULL_IMAGE_TAG}"
        }
        
        failure {
            echo "Pipeline failed!"
        }
        
        cleanup {
            cleanWs()
        }
    }
}
